title: Local Iceberg table not insertable after server restart
description:
### Describe the bug
Easy to reproduce.
### How to reproduce
Run:
```sql
CREATE TABLE t0 (c0 Int) ENGINE = IcebergLocal(local, format = 'CSV', path = 't0/');
INSERT INTO TABLE t0 (c0) VALUES (1);
```
Restart the server, then run:
```
INSERT INTO TABLE t0 (c0) VALUES (2); --DB::Exception: Local object storage `LocalObjectStorage` is readonly. (READONLY)
```
### Error message and/or stacktrace
Stack trace:
```
<Error> TCPHandler: Code: 164. DB::Exception: Local object storage `LocalObjectStorage` is readonly. (READONLY), Stack trace (when copying this message, always include the lines below):
0. contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/include/__exception/exception.h:113: Poco::Exception::Exception(String const&, int) @ 0x0000000026ed6532

4. src/Common/Exception.h:140: DB::Exception::Exception<String>(int, FormatStringHelperImpl<std::type_identity<String>::type>, String&&) @ 0x000000000cee5276
5. src/Disks/ObjectStorages/Local/LocalObjectStorage.cpp:203: DB::LocalObjectStorage::throwIfReadonly() const @ 0x0000000019a86643
6. src/Disks/ObjectStorages/Local/LocalObjectStorage.cpp:74: DB::LocalObjectStorage::writeObject(DB::StoredObject const&, DB::WriteMode, std::optional<std::map<String, String, std::less<String>, std::allocator<std::pair<String const, String>>>>, unsigned long, DB::WriteSettings const&) @ 0x0000000019a85e6c
7. src/Storages/ObjectStorage/DataLakes/Iceberg/IcebergWrites.cpp:761: DB::IcebergStorageSink::consume(DB::Chunk&) @ 0x00000000198be72f
8. src/Processors/Sinks/SinkToStorage.cpp:10: DB::SinkToStorage::onConsume(DB::Chunk) @ 0x000000001f2c6193
9. src/Processors/Transforms/ExceptionKeepingTransform.cpp:134: void std::__function::__policy_invoker<void ()>::__call_impl[abi:se190107]<std::__function::__default_alloc_func<DB::ExceptionKeepingTransform::work()::$_1, void ()>>(std::__function::__policy_storage const*) @ 0x000000001f1a5734
10. contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/include/__functional/function.h:716: ? @ 0x000000001f1a5503
11. src/Processors/Transforms/ExceptionKeepingTransform.cpp:134: DB::ExceptionKeepingTransform::work() @ 0x000000001f1a4ffb
12. src/Processors/Executors/ExecutionThreadContext.cpp:53: DB::ExecutionThreadContext::executeTask() @ 0x000000001ef07490

15. src/Processors/Executors/PushingPipelineExecutor.cpp:131: DB::PushingPipelineExecutor::finish() @ 0x000000001ef1371f

19. base/poco/Net/src/TCPServerConnection.cpp:40: Poco::Net::TCPServerConnection::start() @ 0x0000000026f8cf07
```

poc: CREATE TABLE t0 (c0 Int) ENGINE = IcebergLocal(local, format = 'CSV', path = 't0/');
key_bug_features: Local Iceberg table becomes readonly after server restart
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (c0 Int, c1 String, c2 Nullable(Float64)) ENGINE = IcebergLocal(local, format = 'CSV', path = 't1/');
INSERT INTO t1 (c0, c1, c2) VALUES (1, 'test', NULL);
INSERT INTO t1 (c0, c1, c2) VALUES (2, 'example', 3.14);
SELECT c0, c1, c2 FROM t1 WHERE c2 IS NULL;
CREATE TABLE t2 AS SELECT * FROM t1 WHERE c0 > 0;
